target: Liz AI Teacher Homework System - Full Cycle (Assign, Submit, Auto-Review, Delete)
summary: All homework features working correctly. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified - homework icon with badge, My Homework panel, expandable cards, task description, textarea for submission, Submit to Liz button, feedback display for reviewed homework, delete functionality.

minor.issue: One reviewed homework item has score: null despite feedback containing '3 out of 10' - likely caused by older submission before regex fix

features_tested.notes: Returns homework list with correct fields: homework_id, title, type, task, status, due_date, score, feedback
Creates new homework manually with correct fields and default values
Submits answer, triggers GPT-4o auto-review, returns feedback and extracts score (X/10 or X out of 10 format)
Deletes homework with 404 for non-existent items
Parses [HOMEWORK]...[/HOMEWORK] blocks from Liz responses, auto-creates homework, returns homework_assigned array, removes tags from displayed response
Greeting mentions pending homework items (e.g., 'submit your Academic Word List Practice homework')

features_tested.feature: Frontend: Homework Icon Button with Badge
features_tested.test_method: Playwright - verified visibility and badge count
features_tested.notes: ClipboardList icon in header with red badge showing pending count (data-testid='homework-toggle-btn', 'homework-badge')

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - opened panel and verified cards
features_tested.notes: Panel opens with 'My Homework' header, shows all homework cards (data-testid='homework-panel')
Cards show title, type, due date, status (Due/Submitted/Reviewed) with appropriate colors and icons

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - clicked to expand and verified textarea
features_tested.notes: Clicking pending card shows task description and textarea for submission (data-testid='homework-answer-input')
Teal 'Submit to Liz' button appears in expanded pending homework (data-testid='homework-submit-btn')

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - expanded reviewed card and verified feedback
features_tested.notes: Teal background section shows 'Liz's Feedback:' with score, what they did well, what needs improvement, model answers
Button appears after conversation has more than 2 messages (data-testid='request-homework-btn')

features_tested.test_method: Playwright - verified X button on cards
features_tested.notes: X button visible on each homework card for deletion

seed_data_creation: Used existing homework items (2 pending, 1 reviewed) plus test data created/cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homework system fully tested. Key flows: 1) GET homework returns list with all fields. 2) POST assign creates homework with defaults. 3) POST submit triggers GPT-4o auto-review and extracts score via regex. 4) DELETE removes homework. 5) Chat auto-detects [HOMEWORK] blocks and creates assignments. 6) Greet mentions pending homework. Frontend has homework icon with badge, expandable cards, textarea submission, feedback display with score/feedback/model answers.
